case_title: STEVEN KEARNS VS. CHADBOURNE FAMILY PROPERTIES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY KEARNS, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT CHADBOURNE FAMILY PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
